steps.title: Recognize the opposing effects
steps.content: ABA normally triggers slowdown in plants; Schrenkiella parvula produces ABA yet shows accelerated growth. These are opposite outcomes.

steps.title: Select the transition for opposition
steps.content: In contrast signals the shift between opposite effects. The other three extend (Moreover), exemplify (For example), or logically connect (Thus) the first idea—none fit an opposition. That matches choice B — B is correct.
